name: 7α-Hydroxybaruol
description: 7α-Hydroxybaruol is a triterpenoid reported in botanical constituent surveys. Human pharmacology and safety data remain very limited.
effects: Reported as a triterpenoid constituent in phytochemical work.
No robust human efficacy data identified.
contraindications: Clinical safety profile is not established; avoid concentrated use in pregnancy and in medically complex patients.
interactions: No direct interaction studies located; treat interaction risk as unknown.
summary: 7α-Hydroxybaruol is a triterpenoid reported in botanical constituent surveys. Human pharmacology and safety data remain very limited.
